generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about keeping our allies safe too. Did you know that 72% of NATO members are still relying on foreign tech for critical infrastructure? That's a vulnerability we all share. When we invest in our own capabilities, we're not just protecting ourselves - we're strengthening the entire alliance. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
